applock.title: Gatekeep this app
applock.desc: Lock the app so no one can peep your business

biometrics.title: Use face or prints
biometrics.desc: Unlock with your face or fingerprint

allowRemoteContent.title: Allow remote content
allowRemoteContent.desc: Let Ampersand use the internet to grab remote stuff, like images in Markdown and avatars from other imports.

passwordAlert.text: You fr right now? Before you do this, write your password down somewhere else because if you lose it, your data is cooked and there's no recovery. If you didn't, export your data before you set one!

useIPC: Send the vibes to other apps
